title: ChessMC
body:
**The game is now available right on a single block! No need to build complicated chess boards—everything happens on one block that magically transforms into an arena for intellectual battles**

### Main Features:

**🌟 Chessboard on a single block: Simple and convenient! The chessboard and pieces automatically appear on the block, ready to play**

**🤝 Play against other players: Challenge your skills in real time by playing against friends or other players, all within Minecraft**

## Last version contains:
###     Figure moves — ✅
###     Check — ✅
###     Checkmate — ✅
###     Stalemate — ✅
###     Passed pawn — ✅
###     Castling - ✅
###     En passant capture — ❌
###     Config — ❓


## All of the above features will be implemented in the future. ⏳

**I would appreciate your ideas and feedback. Please leave them in the issues section of my GitHub repository. 🚀**
